We've extracted ourselves and applied what we do to these verticals.
The great thing about the verticals is they require extra things.
So we developed an S-BOM, which is Software Bill of Materials for med devices, you know, because you don't want to have a medical device have vulnerabilities and share your personal data.
So, you know, a lot of software today is made up of components, hence Software Bill of Materials.
Those components have known vulnerabilities, so we can pull the component makeup from a GitHub or, you know, a solution that you're using to manage your product.
And then we'll go out at night and look at known databases where these components may have vulnerabilities, and we can alert you to that.
And we've built things like self-assessment, system security plans, and POEMs, which are all requirements of CMMC.
What we found is, you know, in our automotive efforts.
There is also a self-assessment and an action item needed.
ISO needs action items, and we feel that we can do a free self-assessment in that area as a lead generation tool.

And what we found is the companies that we're getting into the pipeline now are more sophisticated, have an understanding of our platforms and how it can help them, and are less trying to get that SOC 2 at a cheap price.
What they're trying to do is to get a richer set of things done with an ever-increasing need to be more efficient and whatnot.
So that's kind of where we're at with that.
And when you have a great ontology, a database, you know, which is tuned for more complex environments, we can layer in AI on the top of it.

have a connection assistant AI.

opportunity and impact, given what you shared.

And where GrowthX really started to become a thing was where Marcel was CMO at DeepGram, and started to think about how do we approach building these teams and scaling these teams a bit differently, starting to think about the jobs to be done that goes into producing high-quality content, and breaking that down into a variety of different workflows, and arming experts in the loop along the way.
So for us, you know, what we build is really this engine of arming, you know, both SEO and content professionals with AI automation to supercharge them.
